title: Eria ciliata
taxonomy: Eria ciliata is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It is classified under the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Liliopsida, order Asparagales, and family Orchidaceae. The genus Eria belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is further divided into several subgenera. Eria ciliata is a terrestrial orchid, growing in the wild on the roots of other plants or on rocks. Its classification is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis.
